## Example

```esql
ROW str = ["true", "TRuE", "false", "", "yes", "1"]
| EVAL bool = TO_BOOLEAN(str)
```

| str:keyword | bool:boolean |
| --- | --- |
| ["true", "TRuE", "false", "", "yes", "1"] | [true, true, false, false, false, false] |
